location: Guaranteed drop from the Onyx Lord boss at the bottom of the Sealed Tunnel, a mine dungeon in the Capital Outskirts area of Altus Plateau, reached from the Outer Wall Phantom Tree grace.
tactics: From the Outer Wall Phantom Tree grace, head down into the moat area and south past the Land Squirts to find the Sealed Tunnel entrance
Inside, roll through an illusory wall to reach the dungeon's own Site of Grace, then find a second illusory wall nearby hiding the lift down to the mines
The Onyx Lord uses slow gravity-magic sword swings and a telegraphed ranged repulsion blast — punish after each attack rather than trading
This dungeon also leads to the Divine Tower of West Altus (for activating Rykard's Great Rune) and an unlimited Smithing Stone merchant, so it's worth clearing regardless
lore: Forged from golden-hued meteoric ore, this blade hides gravity-warping magic within its edge. It once belonged to the Onyx Lords, an ancient stone-skinned race said to have risen to life when a meteor struck the earth.

builds.name: STR/Int battlemage
builds.why: D-rank Strength and Intelligence scaling with innate magic damage lets it double as a melee weapon and an Int-scaling gravity skill without a separate staff
